description: The Lamborghini Aventador, produced from 2011 to 2022, was the last Lamborghini flagship with a naturally aspirated V12. Its 6.5-litre engine produced 690-770 bhp across various iterations. The Ultimae, limited to 600 units, was the final version. As the last pure V12 Lamborghini, values are expected to appreciate.
